sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this fighting game

special_mechanics.name: Double Jump
special_mechanics.description: Every character can perform a double jump, a signature mechanic of the Power Instinct series

special_mechanics.name: Run and Attack
special_mechanics.description: All characters can attack while running

special_mechanics.name: Character Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Several characters can change their appearance and fighting style by executing certain moves (usually throwing moves)

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Fighting game with limited documented physics parameters. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics descriptions but no quantitative physics values. Double jump and running attacks are documented series features.
sources_used: wikipedia - Power Instinct article (gameplay mechanics section)
